economic_notes: LNIB Aggregates LP has 50.99% interest in Ogilvie Mountain Holdings LP and Lower Nicola Site Services LP engaged in pipeline maintenance and construction. Shulus Forest Enterprises LP engaged in forestry. LNIB Ventures LP engaged in revenue sharing through joint ventures. LNIB Holdings LP, NAIK Development LP, Shulus Farms LP, Shulus Electricity Transmission Line LP also operate. Band guaranteed line of credit for Ogilvie Mountain Holdings LP up to $5,450,000.
notes: Audit is qualified due to incomplete tangible capital asset listing — certain historical assets missing from TCA schedule; effects on financial position undetermined. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated, only 'Chartered Professional Accountants' from Kelowna BC, July 20, 2021. One fully consolidated subsidiary: Lower Nicola Indian Band Development Corporation. Six entities on modified equity basis: LNIB Holdings LP, NAIK Development LP, LNIB Aggregates LP, Shulus Forest Enterprises LP, LNIB Ventures LP, Shulus Farms LP. Three on cost basis: Spayum Holdings LP, All Nations Trust Corporation, BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $8,654,328 + CMHC $214,480 + FNHA $1,433,876 + FNESC $473,226 + Province of BC $703,334 + BC First Nations Gaming $588,658 = $13,067,902. Expenses_salaries_total taken from segmented wages and benefits total of $7,571,629 (note: expenditures by object shows $7,308,764 salaries and benefits which excludes LNIBDC segment). Contaminated sites identified on four parcels — liability not determinable. Cash distribution of $987,844 from LNIB Aggregates LP received April 2021 (subsequent event).
